Job Title: Senior Frontend Developer (Angular)
Company: Nordic Frontend Labs
Location: Remote (EU)
Employment: B2B / Contract

--- Job Description ---
We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer with strong Angular experience
to join our fully remote, EU-based product team. You will build and maintain
customer-facing dashboards used by thousands of businesses across Europe.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain Angular 17+ applications using RxJS and Signals
- Own the component library and design system used across our products
- Write unit and integration tests (Jest, Cypress)
- Collaborate with backend engineers on REST API integration
- Participate in code review and mentor mid-level engineers

Requirements:
- 5+ years of professional Angular development experience
- Strong TypeScript, RxJS, and Signals knowledge
- Experience with unit testing (Jest) and CI/CD pipelines
- Fluent English (written and spoken)
- Fully remote, EU time zone overlap required

Nice to have:
- Experience with NX monorepos
- Familiarity with performance optimization and accessibility (WCAG)

We offer a fully remote position, flexible hours, and a collaborative,
English-speaking engineering culture.
